title: Sass & Belle Sweet Dreams Cloud White Money Bank
features: White fluffy cloud moneybox for saving the pennies by Sass and Belle made by RJB Stone.
description: Saving money has never been so adorable. This sweet dreams collection money box has been carefully designed with great attention to detail. Cloud-shaped, it features a smiling face with pinkish cheeks on the boot.
